mapper.select:
select count(*) from user u where is_Deleted = 'N'
AND ( id like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%') or name like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%') or email like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%') or nickname like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%') or phone like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%') )
u.id like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%')
u.name like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%')
u.email like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%')
u.nickName like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%')
u.phone like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%')

SELECT u.id, u.user_id, u.user_nm, u.email, u.enabled, u.phone_num, u.nickname, u.bank_nm, u.depositor, u.account_number, u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.auth_id, u.point_id, ua.address_Id, u.referrer_no, u.memo, u.role, u.is_stopped, u.guard_type, ua.full_Address, (CASE WHEN u.auth_id = '01' THEN 'ROLE_ADMIN' WHEN u.auth_id = '02' THEN 'ROLE_USER' ELSE 'X' END) AS auth, r.user_id AS referrer_id -- 추천인 user_id FROM user u LEFT OUTER JOIN user_address ua ON u.id = ua.user_id AND ua.is_deleted = 'N' LEFT OUTER JOIN user r ON u.referrer_no = r.id -- 추천인 id와 조인 AND r.is_deleted = 'N' WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER (user_id, user_nm, password, email, nickName, auth_id, role) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userNm}, #{password}, #{email}, #{nickName}, '01', 'Admin')
INSERT INTO user_auth( id, name, auth_cd, auth ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{authCd}, #{auth})
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM user WHERE user_id = #{referrerId} AND is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.update:
UPDATE USER SET
email = #{email}, phone_num = #{phoneNum}, nickname = #{nickName}, bank_nm = #{bankNm}, depositor = #{depositor}, account_number = #{accountNumber}, updated_at = NOW(), address_Id = #{addressId}, memo = #{memo},
referrer_no = #{referrerNo},
updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE USER SET is_deleted = 'Y', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE USER SET role = #{authRole}, auth_id = #{authCode}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 'N'
UPDATE USER SET role = 'LEADER', auth_id = '03', guard_type = '04' updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE USER SET is_stopped = 'Y', stop_date = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE USER SET is_stopped = 'N', stop_date = null, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE point_history ph SET settlement_status = 'COMPLETED' is_deleted = 'Y' WHERE is_deleted = 'N'
UPDATE point_history SET settlement_status = 'COMPLETED' is_deleted = 'Y' WHERE is_deleted = 'N'
UPDATE user_campaign SET is_deleted = 'Y' WHERE is_deleted = 'N'
UPDATE USER SET guard_type = #{guardType}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
